title: T-098 â€” Full Briefâ†’Projectâ†’G3 FGâ†’G4 releaseâ†’Technical approval E2E
prompt:
# T-098 â€” Full E2E G4 release spine

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md final decisions + 2026-05-03 E2E release spike
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Add a full Playwright/integration E2E proving one product can travel from Brief to factory-usable release through the canonical spine:
Brief â†’ NPD project G0 â†’ G1/G2 â†’ G3 FG mapping â†’ department closure â†’ G4 approval â†’ NPD Builder release â†’ Technical approval â†’ release status/read model â†’ factory/Planning visibility.

## Required assertions
- Brief creation creates/links NPD project before FG exists.
- G3 blocks until FG candidate is created/mapped.
- G4 blocks until required departments are Done, RM usability passes, and release preflight is clean.
- NPD Builder creates/links WIP/intermediates, FG, initial shared BOM and factory_spec in one idempotent release.
- Technical approval is required before factory/Planning can consume factory_spec/BOM.
- Release status transitions to pending_technical_approval then approved_for_factory/released_to_factory.
- D365 disabled does not block release; optional D365 export does not set release state.

pipeline_inputs.description: Full E2E test from Brief-created project to Technical-approved factory release/read model.
pipeline_inputs.details: Covers Briefâ†’Project, G3 FG mapping, G4 release orchestrator, Technical approval dependency, release status/read model and D365 optional behavior.
out_of_scope: Implementation of missing production app features beyond test wiring
acceptance_criteria: Given D365 integration is disabled and fixtures are seeded, when the full E2E runs, then DEV project reaches released_to_factory using Monopilot-owned records only.
Given no FG candidate exists at G3, when approval is attempted, then E2E observes FG_CANDIDATE_REQUIRED; after mapping, it proceeds.
Given an RM usability blocker fixture is enabled, when release is attempted, then release aborts with typed blocker and no factory_available_at is set.
Given Technical approval is not yet complete after NPD Builder release, when factory/Planning read model is queried, then the FG is visible as pending but not factory-usable.
Given Technical approval completes for the active BOM/spec bundle, when read model is queried, then status is released_to_factory/approved_for_factory and factory_available_at is non-null.
Given optional D365 export is clicked after release, then release status and active BOM/spec IDs remain unchanged.
test_strategy: RED Playwright happy path with mocked/fixture Technical approval handoff.
RED integration test for event ordering across modules.
RED negative tests for missing FG mapping and RM usability FAIL.
Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e full-product-release && pnpm --filter web test npd-full-release-events'.
risk_red_lines: Do not stop at G3; must include G4 release and Technical approval/read model assertion.
Do not require live D365 or mutate release status from D365 export.
Do not treat factory_spec/BOM as usable before Technical approval.
Do not use FA as canonical visible terminology in E2E assertions.
